---
title: "Skills"
format:
  html:
    css: styles/resume.css
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.page-kicker}
Capabilities
:::

# Skills & Certifications

My background combines hands-on quality assurance expertise with growing strengths in business, leadership, and digital transformation. I work across manual testing, automation, API validation, Agile delivery, and cross-functional collaboration.
:::

::: {.grid}

::: {.card .span-2}
## Core QA Strengths

With over five years of experience in software quality assurance, I have built a strong foundation in both manual and automated testing across web, API, SaaS, and real-time systems. My work focuses on improving reliability, reducing regression effort, and supporting confident releases.

::: {.badges}
<span class="badge">Manual Testing</span>
<span class="badge">Automation Testing</span>
<span class="badge">API Testing</span>
<span class="badge">Regression Testing</span>
<span class="badge">Smoke Testing</span>
<span class="badge">Sanity Testing</span>
<span class="badge">Functional Testing</span>
<span class="badge">Integration Testing</span>
<span class="badge">System Testing</span>
<span class="badge">Cross Browser Testing</span>
<span class="badge">Responsive Testing</span>
<span class="badge">UAT Support</span>
<span class="badge">Defect Management</span>
<span class="badge">Test Planning</span>
<span class="badge">Test Strategy</span>
:::
:::

::: {.card}
## Automation & Tools

I have worked with modern testing tools and frameworks to improve test coverage, speed up regression cycles, and support scalable QA processes.

::: {.badges}
[Playwright]{.badge}
[Cypress]{.badge}
[Selenium]{.badge}
[Postman]{.badge}
[REST Assured]{.badge}
[Jenkins]{.badge}
[Git]{.badge}
[JIRA]{.badge}
[TestRail]{.badge}
[Confluence]{.badge}
[SQL]{.badge}
[Java]{.badge}
[JavaScript]{.badge}
:::
:::

::: {.card}
## Delivery & Ways of Working

I have consistently worked in Agile teams, partnering with developers, product owners, analysts, and stakeholders across multiple time zones to support sprint delivery and release quality.

::: {.badges}
[Agile]{.badge}
[Scrum]{.badge}
[Sprint Planning]{.badge}
[Backlog Grooming]{.badge}
[Release Validation]{.badge}
[QA Sign Off]{.badge}
[CI/CD Support]{.badge}
[Cross Functional Collaboration]{.badge}
[Documentation]{.badge}
[Issue Tracking]{.badge}
:::
:::

::: {.card .span-2}
## Business & Professional Skills

Alongside my technical work, I am building stronger business and leadership capability through my MBA. I am especially interested in connecting software quality with business impact, process improvement, and strategic decision-making.

::: {.badges}
[Analytical Thinking]{.badge}
[Problem Solving]{.badge}
[Communication]{.badge}
[Stakeholder Management]{.badge}
[Leadership Development]{.badge}
[Process Improvement]{.badge}
[Team Collaboration]{.badge}
[Adaptability]{.badge}
[Attention to Detail]{.badge}
[Business Strategy]{.badge}
[Digital Transformation]{.badge}
[Quality Mindset]{.badge}
:::
:::

::: {.card}
## Domain Exposure

My experience spans multiple product and business contexts, helping me adapt quickly to different user needs, workflows, and compliance expectations.

::: {.badges}
[SaaS Platforms]{.badge}
[Insurance Systems]{.badge}
[Travel Insurance]{.badge}
[Document Signing Platforms]{.badge}
[Stock Market Systems]{.badge}
[Real Time Financial Platforms]{.badge}
[IoT Applications]{.badge}
:::
:::

::: {.card .skills-edu}
## Education & Certification

::: {.item}
::: {.item-top}
::: {.item-title}
MBA Candidate
:::
::: {.item-date}
Current
:::
:::
::: {.item-sub}
University Canada West
:::
:::

::: {.item}
::: {.item-top}
::: {.item-title}
BSc (Hons) in Information Technology
:::
::: {.item-date}
Completed
:::
:::
::: {.item-sub}
SLIIT
:::
:::

:::

:::
